description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical beverage can with a metallic silver top and a vibrant red body. The can features the iconic Coca-Cola branding in bold white script, accompanied by dynamic white and yellow swooshes and small water droplet graphics to evoke a sense of cold refreshment. The surface is glossy and smooth, with realistic reflections and highlights. Nutritional information, barcodes, and recycling symbols are printed on the back in white text. The can's top is slightly domed with a pull-tab opening mechanism. The overall appearance is sleek, modern, and instantly recognizable as a soft drink container.
description: A tall, glossy red Coca-Cola can with silver top, white script branding, and detailed labeling. The surface is smooth and reflective, with realistic water droplet graphics.
description_view_0: The can is shown with the Coca-Cola script partially visible, highlighting the red, white, and yellow swoosh graphics and the metallic top.
description_view_1: This view centers the Coca-Cola logo in bold white script, with the dynamic swoosh design and water droplets clearly visible.
description_view_2: The back of the can is visible, displaying nutritional information, barcode, recycling symbols, and smaller text details.
description_view_3: This angle shows the side of the can, with partial Coca-Cola branding and a glimpse of the nutritional label and barcode.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is prominently displayed in large, white cursive script on the front and sides of the can, set against a red background with white and yellow swooshes.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic flavor; no additional flavor cues are present.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information, ingredients, and a barcode are visible on the back of the can in white text.
